seoTitle: Turriff East vs Tutye — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Turriff East and Tutye. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Turriff East vs Tutye: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turriff East and Tutye.
heading: Turriff East vs Tutye — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turriff East, Victoria and Tutye, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tutye has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Turriff East (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turriff East or Tutye safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turriff East has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Tutye scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turriff East scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Tutye scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turriff East or Tutye?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tutye has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
